title: Synthetic DCHK decision SYN-DCHK-2023-014

pages.text:
The Dental Council of Hong Kong (Synthetic)
DISCIPLINARY INQUIRY
Dentists Registration Ordinance
Case Reference: SYN-DCHK-2023-014
Defendant: Dr John Specimen (Reg. No.: D12345)
Date of hearing: 8 November 2023
Charge: That he, being a registered dentist, practised dentistry at premises that were not suitably equipped, and was guilty of misconduct in a professional respect.

Findings and Order
Finding: The Council finds the charge proved.
Mitigation included genuine remorse.
Order: That the Defendant be removed from the register for a period of 1 month, suspended for 12 months.
Appeal status: no appeal lodged within the stated period in this synthetic fixture.
